adjudication_raw: Votes: a1=critique_wins, a2=critique_wins, a3=critique_wins. Unanimous: critique_wins
assessor_1_raw: Assessor 1: Architecture and text modality confounded. No clinical baseline. Verdict: critique_wins.
assessor_2_raw: Assessor 2: Missing LACE/HOSPITAL score comparison makes results uncontextualizable. Architecture confounder. Verdict: critique_wins.
assessor_3_raw: Assessor 3: Two structural issues: feature+architecture confounder and absent clinical benchmark. Verdict: critique_wins.
